libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Focus on fixing the version-sensitive Java test behavior around value-to-object/property conversion. Do not add a Neo4j container unless intentionally replacing the current unit-style coverage with an end-to-end Driver/Session query test.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8857 [Automation] java run fails for org.neo4j.driver:neo4j-java-driver:5.28.8; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Full end-to-end coverage of GraphDatabase.driver, sessions, and Cypher execution would require a running Neo4j DBMS, but that is not necessary to address this java-run failure.
Optional artifact integrations such as SLF4J, Micrometer, BlockHound, or certificate/security edge cases are not needed for the existing failure path.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra setup is required: the resolved artifact brings its Bolt/Netty/Reactor runtime dependencies transitively, and the failing existing coverage is in Neo4j value/object mapping code, not in a path that needs a running Neo4j server.
